steps.title: Set up the ticket count equation
steps.content: The petting zoo sold a total of 250 tickets. With $s$ standard tickets and $p$ premium tickets: $$s + p = 250$$

steps.title: Set up the revenue equation and identify the system
steps.content: Standard tickets cost 5 dollars and premium tickets cost 12 dollars. With 2,300 dollars total revenue: $$5s + 12p = 2,300$$ Our derived system—$s + p = 250$ and $5s + 12p = 2,300$—matches the correct answer — A is correct.
